name: Coconut Cake, Complete Dessert
recipeIngredient: sweetened whipped cream or whipped topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter until light and fluffy; gradually add sugar and cream until very light.
2. Beat egg yolks until lemon-colored; add to butter mixture, blending well.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt; add to creamed mixture in 3 parts, alternating with coconut milk and ending with the flour mixture.
4. Add vanilla; stir in 3/4 cup shredded coconut.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff; gently fold into cake batter.
6. Turn batter into 2 greased, floured 9-inch layer pans; bake in preheated 350°F oven for 25 minutes, or until a cake tester or wooden pick inserted near the center comes out dry.
7. Cool in pans for 15 minutes.
8. Loosen and invert onto racks to cool completely.
9. Frost with whipped cream; sprinkle remaining shredded coconut over top and sides of cake.
Coconut Milk:
3/4 cup milk
3 tablespoons grated coconut, packed
